name: board
description: Read and write the workspace BOARD.md shared task board via the bin/board Python CLI, which preserves the markdown schema and appends to the activity log automatically.

interface.shortDescription: Read and write the workspace BOARD.md shared task board via the bin/board Python CLI, which preserves the markdown schema and appends to the activity log automatically.
interface.longDescription: Use the bin/board CLI to add, claim, and complete tasks on BOARD.md rather than editing the file by hand.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use BOARD — Shared Task Board safely.
